message:
feat(syscall): add process management syscall wrappers

Adds syscall constants and wrappers for process management operations:
- sys_setpgid/sys_getpgrp for process groups
- sys_setuid/sys_setgid/sys_getegid for user/group identity
- sys_chdir/sys_fchdir for directory changes
- sys_close_range for bulk file descriptor closing
- sys_sched_setparam for scheduling parameters
- sys_unlinkat for file removal

Prepares for process_abi.rs migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
